details.redacted_summary: # 2026-02-25 - 15:03: User said "hello". - 16:07: User said "你好". - 16:14: User said "你好". - 16:22: User said "？？". I apologized for the delay and asked how I can help. - 16:22: User asked for "人工" (human support). I explained I am an AI and asked for details of their issue.

triage.rationale: The summary contains only generic greetings, a punctuation prompt, and a request for human support, with no apparent identifiers, secrets, credentials, sensitive personal data, or substantive private project details.
suggested_redactions: No additional content redactions needed for the summarized interaction.
If publishing beyond the review system, omit internal source references and hashes.
triage.release_summary: A user initiated contact with brief greetings and a punctuation-only follow-up, then requested human support. The assistant acknowledged the delay, clarified that it was an AI assistant, and asked the user to provide details so the issue could be routed or handled appropriately.
triage.reusable_lesson: When a user asks for human support without context, acknowledge the request and ask for the issue details needed to proceed or escalate.
